# Budget

## Fixed Capital Budget Allocation

| **Activity** | **Sub Task** | **Estimated Cost (UGX)** |
|--------------|--------------|---------------------------|
| **Registration and Legal Fees** | Draft and approve SACCO by-laws | 20,000,000 |
| | Register with national authorities | 20,000,000 |
| | Open institutional bank accounts | 60,000,000 |
| | Establish governance structures | 80,000,000 |
| **Establish Countrywide Branches** | Furniture | 300,000,000 |
| | Office Equipment | 300,000,000 |
| | Printers | 160,000,000 |
| **Technology and Software** | | 80,000,000 |
| **Member Recruitment and Onboarding** | Design branding and recruitment strategy | 40,000,000 |
| | Partner with universities, hubs, associations | 100,000,000 |
| | Facilitate physical and digital registration | 100,000,000 |
| | Professional Fees | 60,000,000 |
| **Financial Products Design** | Conduct market needs assessments | 50,000,000 |
| | Initial Loan Reserves | 240,000,000 |
| | Reserve Fund | 500,000,000 |
| | Set interest rates and repayment schedules | 20,000,000 |
| **Partnership Development & Fundraising** | Identify potential funding partners | 40,000,000 |
| | Develop investment proposal documents | 30,000,000 |
| | Host donor/investor roundtables | 60,000,000 |
| | Apply for grants | 20,000,000 |
| **Mentorship & Acceleration Programs** | Develop a mentorship curriculum | 60,000,000 |
| | Enroll mentors from tech and academia | 60,000,000 |
| | Match startups with mentors | 40,000,000 |
| | Monitor progress of mentored ventures | 40,000,000 |
| **Marketing and Promotion** | Quarterly SACCO tech summits | 120,000,000 |
| | National pitch days and demo showcases | 80,000,000 |
| | Media partnerships for visibility | 40,000,000 |
| | Recognize top-performing startups | 40,000,000 |
| **Financial Literacy & Business Training** | Develop training materials | 60,000,000 |
| | Conduct workshops | 80,000,000 |
| | Partner with experts | 40,000,000 |
| | Monitor training impact | 20,000,000 |
| **Monitoring and Evaluation** | Design M&E framework | 40,000,000 |
| | Develop digital dashboards | 60,000,000 |
| | Conduct periodic assessments | 40,000,000 |
| | Refine products and strategies | 20,000,000 |
| **Policy Advocacy & Engagement** | Map key policy stakeholders | 20,000,000 |
| | Join innovation and SACCO forums | 20,000,000 |
| | Draft policy briefs | 20,000,000 |
| | Organize dialogues and roundtables | 40,000,000 |
| **TOTAL** | | **UGX 3,220,000,000** |

---

## Operational Budget — Year 1

| **Category** | **Description** | **Budget (UGX)** |
|--------------|-----------------|------------------|
| Feasibility Study & Needs Assessment | Baseline survey, SACCO demand analysis, data collection | 48,000,000 |
| Personnel & Staff Salaries | National & branch staff salaries for 1 year | 400,000,000 |
| Operational Costs | Utilities, transport, communications, office supplies | 70,000,000 |
| Digital Platform Maintenance & Support | Annual licensing, cloud hosting, cybersecurity, MIS support | 70,000,000 |
| Marketing, Recruitment & Outreach | Member mobilization, media campaigns, branding | 50,000,000 |
| Training & Capacity Building | Staff and member training on digital tools and SACCO management | 80,000,000 |
| Maintenance Costs | Upkeep of office equipment and facilities | 45,000,000 |
| **Loan Capital for Startups (Revolving Fund)** | Initial capital for micro-loans, startup prototyping, early business scaling | **900,000,000** |
| Mentorship & Acceleration Programs | Program coordination, mentor incentives, startup support kits | 35,000,000 |
| Innovation Events & Networking | SACCO summits, pitch days, demo showcases, awards | 20,000,000 |
| Audit Costs | External auditing for compliance and transparency | 12,000,000 |
| Policy Engagement & Advocacy | Policy roundtables, forum participation, drafting briefs | 50,000,000 |
| **TOTAL** | | **UGX 1,780,000,000** |

> **Note:** The operational budget covers Year 1 only. The UGX 900M loan capital is a revolving fund — principal and interest will be recycled. The overall 5-year capital mobilization target is UGX 50 billion.
